description: WeWeb allowed endpoint patterns. Verifier fails if forbidden /rest/v1/ direct table access is detected in repo-owned frontend artifacts. Governed by Build Route 10.2.
notes: Direct table access via /rest/v1/<table> is forbidden. All WeWeb data access must go through /rest/v1/rpc/<function> using the execute_allowlist. Enforced by ci_weweb_drift_guard.mjs.
